# GovSchema

> GovSchema is the trusted, versioned, machine-readable contract that lets AI agents understand, validate, and safely prepare government forms and workflows — without guessing from webpages, HTML, or PDFs. Open-source and independent: it describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them.

GovSchema is an independent, open-source standards foundation. It is not a government entity and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or acting on behalf of any government. GovSchema publishes standards; it does not fill out forms or transact with government services on anyone's behalf.

## Standard

- [Specification](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellogov-ai/govschema/main/spec/v0.2/SPEC.md): The normative GovSchema document format (draft, v0.2).
- [Meta-schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellogov-ai/govschema/main/spec/v0.2/govschema.schema.json): JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) every GovSchema document validates against.
- [How agents consume this](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellogov-ai/govschema/main/docs/agent-consumption.md): Every consumption path side by side: raw fetch + JSON Schema validation (the baseline), this file, the reference MCP server, and the installable Skill.
- [Schema registry](https://github.com/hellogov-ai/govschema/tree/main/registry): Published, versioned GovSchema documents for real government forms and processes.
- [Discovery catalog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellogov-ai/govschema/main/discovery/catalog.json): Prioritized inventory of government processes GovSchema plans to schematize next.
- [Verification practices](https://github.com/hellogov-ai/govschema/tree/main/practices): Documented methods for confirming a schema still matches its live government source.
- [Contributing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hellogov-ai/govschema/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to propose a schema, review one, or otherwise contribute.
